description: Thin shim — Renovate policy for JacobPEvans-personal repos now inherits the dryvist/.github master, the single source of truth for Renovate policy across all dryvist AND JacobPEvans repos.

Consumers reference this via local>JacobPEvans/.github:renovate-presets (the JacobPEvans login redirects to JacobPEvans-personal/.github). Keep this file a pass-through; add or change policy in dryvist/.github, never here, so the two never diverge again.
